name: Crockpot Kowloon Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 pounds Chicken parts or cut up fryer
recipeInstructions:
1. Season chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Place seasoned chicken in the crockpot.
3. Combine ginger, garlic, broth, and pineapple juice (syrup) in a bowl.
4. Cut pineapple slices into fourths.
5. Arrange pineapple slices and water chestnuts over the chicken.
6. Pour the ginger sauce mixture over all.
7. Cover and cook on low for 3-4 hours, or until tender.
8. Add green onions to the crockpot.
9. Dissolve cornstarch in soy sauce and vinegar.
10. Stir the cornstarch mixture into the pot.
11. Cover and cook on high for 10-15 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
12. Serve with crisp Chinese noodles.
